reasoning: The base value for 2026-01-18 is expected to be 18.99 (the last trading day close on Jan 16). This level is somewhat elevated compared to the recent late December/early January range of 17.80 - 18.40. Statistical models predicting mean reversion give a ~30% probability of a further increase by Jan 25, although the upcoming FOMC meeting on Jan 27-28 could generate some short-term upward pressure on implied volatility just prior (pushing my estimate to 0.33 instead of 0.30). For the February 17 resolution date, volatility distributions are right-skewed and variance expands over time, pulling the probability closer to 50% (0.42).
